title: Insertion Order
description: A formal insertion order attached to a committed proposal. Contains structured terms for agent validation and optional signing URLs for human approval workflows.

io_id.description: Unique identifier for this insertion order. Referenced by io_acceptance on create_media_buy.

terms.description: Structured terms for agent validation. Agents can programmatically verify these match the proposal and campaign requirements.

terms_url.description: URL to a human-readable document containing the full insertion order terms

signing_url.description: URL to an electronic signing service (e.g., DocuSign) for human signature workflows. When present, a human must sign before the buyer agent can proceed with create_media_buy.

requires_signature.description: Whether the buyer must accept this IO before creating a media buy. When true, create_media_buy requires an io_acceptance referencing this io_id.
